author: y4rr
content: Plan: (1) Add roll_f32 PTX kernel in new file ferrotorch-gpu/src/roll.rs using the same outer/dim_size/inner factorization the CPU path uses (matches the cumsum kernel pattern). Each thread maps one output element (o, k_new, i): src = (o * dim_size + k_src) * inner + i where k_src = (k_new - shift_norm + dim_size) % dim_size. shift_norm = ((shifts % dim_size) + dim_size) % dim_size. (2) Extend the GpuBackend trait in ferrotorch-core/src/gpu_dispatch.rs with roll_f32(handle, outer, dim_size, inner, shift_norm) -> default Err. (3) Implement roll_f32 in ferrotorch-gpu/src/backend_impl.rs by delegating to gpu_roll. (4) Replace the NotImplementedOnCuda in ops/tensor_ops.rs::roll<T> with the GPU fast path for f32 (same pattern as cumsum_forward). (5) Replace the NotImplementedOnCuda in grad_fns/shape.rs::RollBackward::backward by dispatching to the same backend with the negated shift. (6) Add unit tests in roll.rs (1D shift, 2D multi-axis shift, negative wraparound). (7) Add discriminating GPU-vs-CPU test in ops/tensor_ops.rs gated on the cuda feature.
